summary: The diff implements the trading article landing page with most requirements well-covered: three content sections, sticky navigation/TOC, semantic HTML, SEO meta tags, dark charcoal/gold color palette, serif/sans-serif typography, and responsive layout. However, the hero banner image asset (trading-hero.dim_1200x500.png) is not present in the diff — no file under frontend/public/assets/generated is added — meaning REQ-3's image file requirement is unmet. The article page references a hero section but relies on CSS/overlay rather than a served image asset. No significant hallucinated features were detected.

missing_requirements.requirement: Hero banner image (trading-hero.dim_1200x500.png) served from frontend/public/assets/generated, displayed as a full-width background in the hero section, visually consistent with the dark charcoal and gold theme.
missing_requirements.reason: No image file is added anywhere in the diff. There is no file under frontend/public/assets/generated, and no reference to trading-hero.dim_1200x500.png appears in any of the added files. The hero section appears to rely on CSS styling rather than a static image asset.
